productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Melbourne White Gravity Shoe
description: CompositionWhite and grey shoes with strong phylon midsole, synthetic mesh upper, cushioned collar and tongue, and synthetic and carbon rubber outsoleCare1. Use soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust from surface2. Do not machine washSpecially engineered for those who love to hit the gym to stay well toned, looking stylish all the time, this pair of shoes from lotto is an absolute pleasure for the feet. The mesh upper in shades of grey and white not only makes it look fashionable, but also ensures ample ventilation for the feet. The pair has padded collars and tongues to ensure a snug Fit, while the cushioned insoles take the natural curve of the feet rendering comfort at its best. With a lightweight midsole, you can be assured that your feet are well protected from impact in these shoes, while the arched multi-directional outsole enhances grip and support, making the shoe slip resistant. To add to this is the cross-laced mechanism, which keeps the foot firm in place and provides added grip on rough terrain.
